creator: rec@rcousins.com
text:
I just upgraded from MySQL 5.7 to MySQL 8.0. PKG deleted my associated libraries: MySQL Connector C++ and for C. If I ask PKG to install MySQL Connector C++ or C, it wants to backrev me to MySQL 5.7.

Is there a work around or way to make PKG let me install without backreving? I know for a fact that the libraries will work with 8.0.
